title: Avoid setting serialVersionUID to 0L in records
description: Setting the serialVersionUID field to 0L in Java records is misleading and can cause serialization issues. Records are intended to be simple data carriers, and improper serialVersionUID values may break compatibility or intent. Always use a meaningful value or omit the field if not needed.
recommendation: Do not set serialVersionUID to 0L in records. Use a meaningful value or omit the field if serialization is not required.

checks.message: Do not set serialVersionUID to 0L in records. Use a meaningful value or omit the field if serialization is not required.
